function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system, and used canonical cast records for birthday authority.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-23. A complete birthday search in 10_entities/cast (total_matches 37, below limit 100) showed the nearest upcoming birthday date is 03-26; canonical file 10_entities/cast/lukas.md confirms that date belongs to Lukas Brenner. No ties on that date were found.
